title: Figure 14 from: Pourmoghaddam MJ, Lambert C, Voglmayr H, Khodaparast SA, Stadler M (2026) A polyphasic study of Hypoxylaceae (Xylariales, Ascomycota) in Iran: new species and records from Hyrcanian forests. MycoKeys 131: 1-40. https://doi.org/10.3897/mycokeys.131.186541
author: Pourmoghaddam, Mohammad Javad
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: Figure 14 Hypoxylon perforatum (GUM 1610). A, B. Stromatal habit; C, D. Close-up view of stromatal surface; E. Stroma in vertical section showing perithecia; F. KOH-extractable pigments from stroma; G. Immature ascus in water; H, I. Mature ascus in water; J. Immature and mature asci in Melzer's reagent; K, L. Ascospores in 10% KOH with dehiscent perispore (red arrows: immature ascospores; black arrow: dehiscent perispore). Scale bars: 1 cm (A, B); 1 mm (C–E); 20 µm (G–J); 10 µm (K, L).
